chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-383 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha peshi. For hearing of MA No.1780 / 2017. 06-02-2018 None present for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. Syed Meeral Shah Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. This is second call, none present on behalf of petitioner. No intimation received. It is now 01.15 p.m. Learned A.A.G. and A.P.G. are present in Court submit that in this matter challan has been submitted before the trial Court on 08.02.2017, therefore, according to them, this constitutional petition has become infructuous, which is liable to be dismissed. As per statement of learned A.A.G. and A.P.G. challan has been submitted before the trial Court, therefore, only remedy lies with the petitioner to approach trial Court for redressal of his grievance by filing appropriate proceedings and on filing appropriate application, the trial Court shall then decide the same in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed along with listed application. Office is directed to immediately send copy of this order to the trial Court for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
